DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:D.PADILLA/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C JURY TRIAL. ATNY NILS ROSENQUEST PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT JOYCE BOOK PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOK, JOYCE ANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 GLENVIEW DRIVE #14, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFS WAIVE ABCK RENT & DMGS BUT RETAIN ANY DEPOSITS PAID BY DEFT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO PAY DEFT $500 FOR MOVING EXPENSES. MUTUAL STAY AWAY BETWEEN DEFT & RESIDENT MANAGER. NO LOUD NOISE BY DEFT AFTER 10PM. IF DEFT IN VIOL OF ABOVE, PLTS MAY APPLY EX-PARTE FOR HRG RE STAY.
